basic_details.job_title: KEA – Agriculture Officer, Assistant Agriculture Officer – 945 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Agriculture, Government of Karnataka
basic_details.post_name: 1. Agriculture Officer (Krushi Adhikari) | 2. Assistant Agriculture Officer (Sahayaka Krushi Adhikari)
basic_details.short_information: KEA AO AAO Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 945 Agriculture Officer, Assistant Agriculture Officer vacancies across Karnataka. Candidates with B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through KEA website, cetonline.karnataka.gov.in/kea.

qualification.education_qualification: The State Government retains the right to conduct a full medical examination by a medical board and remove candidates who are declared medically unfit; this rule cannot be waived under any provision

selection_process: Competitive Written Examination (Offline-OMR type) + Kannada Language Test
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the Karnataka PSC website. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before filling the online application form, candidates must read the notification carefully. Incorrect or false information submitted in the application may lead to cancellation of candidature and legal action as per rules.
seo_tags: KEA AO AAO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 945 Agriculture Officer, Assistant Agriculture Officer Posts
